quality.rationale: 完整应力张量推导与视界能流积分，具超辐射物理背景且逻辑严密

origin.question: Problem 17.16 (f) Show that, for a wave of the form $\Phi = \exp(-\mathrm{i}\omega t + \mathrm{i}\mathrm{m}\phi)\mathrm{f}(\mathbf{r},\theta)$ , energy flows out of the hole if $0 < \omega / \mathfrak{m} < \mathfrak{a} / (2\mathbf{M}\mathbf{r}_{+})$ . Compare to Problem 17.15.
origin.solution: (f) The stress-energy tensor for a scalar field is$$4 \pi \mathrm {T}_{\alpha \beta} = \Phi_{, (\alpha} \Phi_{, \beta)}^{*} - \frac {1}{2} \mathrm {g}_{\alpha \beta} | \Phi_{, \gamma} \Phi_{, \gamma} |.$$The complex conjugation is necessary because the representation of $\Phi$ is complex. The energy flux vector is $\mathbf{J}_{\beta} = -\mathbf{T}_{\alpha\beta} \xi^{\alpha}$ , where $\pmb{\xi}$ is the time Killing vector $\partial/\partial t$ (see Problem 10.11). The energy flux into the horizon is found by integrating the radial component of $\mathbf{J}$ over the2-surface $\mathbf{r} = \mathbf{r}_{+}$$$\frac {\mathrm {d} \mathbf {E}}{\mathrm {d} t} = \int \mathrm {T}_{\mathrm {t}}^{\mathrm {r}} | \mathbf {g} |^{\frac {1}{2}} \mathrm {d} \theta \mathrm {d} \phi .$$Since$$\begin{array}{l}4 \pi \mathrm {T}_{\mathrm {t}}^{\mathrm {r}} = \operatorname {R e} \left(\Phi_{, \mathrm {t}} \Phi^{*} , \mathrm {r}\right) = \operatorname {R e} \left(\Phi_{, \mathrm {t}} \Phi^{*} \frac {\mathrm {r}^{2} + \mathrm {a}^{2}}{\sum}\right) \\= \omega (\omega - \mathrm {m} \omega_{+}) S^{2} (\theta) \frac {2 \mathrm {M r}_{+}}{\sum}, \\\end{array}$$we have$$\frac {\mathrm {d} \mathrm {E}}{\mathrm {d} t} = \omega (\omega - \mathrm {m} \omega_{+}) \frac {2 \mathrm {M r}_{+}}{4 \pi} \int \mathrm {S}^{2} (\theta) \sin \theta \mathrm {d} \theta \mathrm {d} \phi$$and $\mathrm{dE} / \mathrm{dt}$ is negative, i.e. energy flows out of the horizon if $\omega -\mathfrak{m}\omega_{+} < 0$ i.e. if $0 <   \omega /\mathfrak{m} <   \omega_{+}$ in agreement with Problem 17.15.
